title: phyllanthus subcrenulatus
intro: Phyllanthus subcrenulatus, also known as the small-leaf phyllanthus, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Phyllanthus subcrenulatus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve liver function, and reduce oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, this plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it has also been used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
